From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[hrw](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/hrw "wiktionary:hrw")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**HRW** usually refers to [Human Rights Watch](/wiki/Human_Rights_Watch "Human Rights Watch"), a human rights advocacy group.

**HRW** may also refer to:

* [Harrow & Wealdstone station](/wiki/Harrow_%26_Wealdstone_station "Harrow & Wealdstone station"), in London
* [Highest random weight hashing](/wiki/Highest_random_weight_hashing "Highest random weight hashing")
* [Holt, Rinehart, Winston](/wiki/Holt,_Rinehart,_Winston "Holt, Rinehart, Winston"), an American publisher; now part of Holt McDougal
* *[Hulk Hogan's Rock 'n' Wrestling](/wiki/Hulk_Hogan%27s_Rock_%27n%27_Wrestling "Hulk Hogan's Rock 'n' Wrestling")*, an American animated television series
* [Human right to water](/wiki/Human_right_to_water "Human right to water")
* [Tangga language](/wiki/Tangga_language "Tangga language"), spoken in Papua New Guinea
